subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the story and characters in the chapter
Identify the main events and plot development
Recognize the psychological and emotional state of the protagonist
Develop basic comprehension and summarization skills
Learn and use new vocabulary from the chapter

lesson_plan.title: Introduction and Context
topics_covered: Setting and background of the story
Introduction to the main character, Apoorva
teaching_strategy: Teacher-led discussion about fears and phobias
student_activities: Discuss what causes fear and anxiety
Predict the events of the story based on title

lesson_plan.title: Reading – Initial Situation
topics_covered: Description of his personality and fears
Introduction to the mirror and snake imagery

lesson_plan.title: Rising Action and Conflict
topics_covered: Apoorva sees the snake in the mirror
teaching_strategy: Discussion on cause-and-effect between perception and fear
student_activities: List the events leading to Apoorva’s fear
Explain in own words why he reacts strongly

lesson_plan.title: Climax and Resolution
topics_covered: Apoorva realizes the snake is a reflection
teaching_strategy: Board flowchart of events from conflict to resolution
student_activities: Write a short paragraph describing the climax
Discuss what Apoorva learns from the experience

lesson_plan.title: Themes, Characters, and Summary
topics_covered: Main theme: Fear and its effects on human mind
Writing a simple summary of the story
teaching_strategy: Teacher explanation of themes and character traits
student_activities: Write a 6–8 sentence summary of the chapter

lesson_plan.title: Vocabulary, Reflection, and Application
topics_covered: Important words and phrases from the chapter
Reflecting on fear and handling it
Applying story lessons to real life
teaching_strategy: Board explanation of vocabulary with examples
student_activities: List new words with meanings and use in sentences
Write a reflection on how fear can be managed
Class discussion on handling imagination and perception

teacher_tip: Encourage students to connect the story to real-life fears, and discuss how perception can affect emotions and reactions.
